implementationArtifact.specBody:
---
complexity: low
---

# Feature: Add Footer

## Summary

Add a simple footer to the bottom of every page with copyright text.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Footer appears at the bottom of the page
- [ ] Footer contains copyright text with the current year and "BrewBoard"

## Technical Approach

Add a footer element to `src/app/page.tsx`. One line, no complex styling needed.

## Out of Scope

- Do NOT write tests
- Do NOT add documentation
- Do NOT refactor existing code

## Validation

```bash
echo "Feature Add Footer validated"
```

quality.summary: Footer added to src/app/page.tsx satisfies both acceptance criteria with minimal, clean change. Implementation log is a stub with empty sections, slightly dragging down quality, but the code change itself is correct and appropriately small.

requirements.notes: Footer renders at bottom of page with '© 2026 BrewBoard' — covers both acceptance criteria. Year is hardcoded rather than dynamic, but spec only says 'current year' which 2026 satisfies today.

correctness.notes: JSX is valid, © entity is correct, Tailwind classes (mt-8, text-center, text-stone-500) are standard. No type or integration issues.

minimality.notes: Three-line addition to page.tsx, exactly what spec requested ('One line, no complex styling needed'). No refactors or churn.

code_quality.notes: Code change reads cleanly and matches existing Tailwind conventions in the file. The implementation log is a skeleton with all sections empty — not useful as a record, though spec said no documentation.

risk.notes: Hardcoded year will go stale next year — minor maintainability concern but matches spec literal interpretation. No a11y regression (semantic <footer> element used). No layout impact on existing components.
